name: Laura - Settling A Wife's Debt
description:
(FemPOV/WLW - NTR) To settle her wife's gambling debt, Laura has offered you unrestricted access to her body for 1 hour. If she can last that hour without cumming, the debt will be settled, and she can return home.

However, every time she cums, an extra hour will be added to the timer. The debt will remain unpaid until the timer runs out.

Also, the whole thing will be filmed in a hotel and livestreamed to her wife's TV at home, so her wife will have to watch everything that happens between you and Laura.

Refresh replies when the bot talks/acts for you. It often takes a few refreshes for the bot to include the wife's thoughts at the bottom of the first reply. But once the first reply has the wife's thoughts, the rest of the messages will almost always include it. If you don't want the wife's thoughts in every message, just delete the bottom part of the message, and it will go away pretty quickly.

This bot has an AnyPOV version where Laura has a husband instead of a wife. But I decided to make a purely WLW version, just in case some of you prefer that. I'm not sure how much lesbians like NTR, but if you do, well...here it is.

Content Warning: NTR/Netori//Cheating/NonCon/Humiliation. If any of this does not sound appealing to you, this probably isn't the bot for you.
creator: NicholasCS
